\tzpentry{ID3707}{Magnetic Helicity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3707 introduces Magnetic Helicity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{M} = \mathrm{SO}(3) \times \mathbb{R}^3 \times \mathfrak{so}(3)^* \times (\mathbb{R}^3)^*, \end{equation}
